metadata.title: BurstPick — AI Burst Photo Culling, Built by Photographers
metadata.description: We shoot 10,000+ frames per session and got tired of the cull. BurstPick uses on-device AI to group burst sequences, score them for sharpness and composition, and pull up the keepers in seconds.

hero.tagline: Stop spending 8+ hours culling. Start shooting.
hero.description: Every burst shoot means thousands of near-identical frames and hours of sorting. BurstPick scores each shot on sharpness, exposure, noise, face quality, and aesthetics, then puts the best ones at the top. It picks up on your preferences over time. You make the final call.

showcase.heading: Built by Photographers, for Photographers
showcase.description: We know the burst workflow because we live it. Wildlife action sequences, indoor sports at 30fps, event coverage with thousands of frames. We built BurstPick because we were tired of the grind.

story.heading: From Thousands to Your Top Picks
story.description: Every shoot produces hundreds of near-identical frames. BurstPick groups them, scores them, and puts the best ones first. Seconds instead of hours. You pick the winners.
story.before_desc: Hundreds of near-identical burst shots filling your screen. Where do you even start?
story.after_desc: Your top picks ranked by sharpness, exposure, and composition, ready for review

features.heading: Why BurstPick?
features.subheading: Go from thousands of burst shots to your best picks. All AI, all on your device.
features.clustering_desc: No more scrolling through 200 near-identical frames. BurstPick recognizes each burst sequence and groups it for you, so you start with organized sets instead of a wall of thumbnails.
features.scoring_desc: Every photo is scored on sharpness, exposure, noise, composition, and face quality. The strongest candidates rise to the top. You just confirm or override.
features.raw_desc: ARW, CR2, CR3, NEF, DNG, and 21 more RAW formats, plus HEIC, HEIF, AVIF, WebP, and JPEG XL. Bring your files straight from the card.
features.face_title: Find Every Face in the Shoot
features.face_desc: Detects faces and groups them by person across your entire session. Great for events: find every shot of a specific subject in seconds.
features.compare_desc: Put up to 4 finalists next to each other with synced zoom and color-accurate previews. See the difference down to the pixel.
features.workflow_desc: Keep, reject, star-rate, color-label. Every decision autosaves. Your originals are never touched.
features.lightroom_desc: Export your picks as XMP sidecars or straight into a Lightroom Classic catalog. Photo Mechanic, BurstPick, Lightroom. No extra steps.
features.c2pa_desc: C2PA content credentials are preserved throughout your workflow, so provenance and authenticity stay intact. No data collection, no tracking (GDPR compliant by design). ICC color management keeps colors accurate across your pipeline.

gallery.heading: See BurstPick in Action
gallery.subheading: Built for speed and accuracy. Here's what the interface looks like.
gallery.main_ui_desc: Clusters on the left, your selected photo front and center, filmstrip at the bottom. Everything one glance away.
gallery.clustering_desc: Each burst sequence grouped automatically. Scroll through sets, not hundreds of loose frames.
gallery.scoring_desc: Every photo ranked by sharpness, exposure, and composition. Adjust the weights to match how you shoot.
gallery.compare_desc: Put your top picks side by side with synced zoom. Spot the winner instantly.
gallery.persons_desc: Every person in your shoot, grouped automatically. Jump straight to the subject you need.
gallery.scoring_food_desc: Drill into AI scores for any photo: sharpness, exposure, composition, all broken down at a glance.
gallery.scoring_whiskey_desc: See how BurstPick handles challenging low-light shots and finds the best candidate.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: 26 RAW formats (ARW, CR2, CR3, NEF, DNG, ORF, RW2, RAF, and more), plus HEIC, HEIF, JPG, PNG, TIFF, AVIF, WebP, and JPEG XL.
faq.a2: Free during the beta. After launch, Pro will be available as a one-time in-app purchase on the Mac App Store. No subscription, no recurring fees.
faq.a3: Mac: macOS 14 (Sonoma) or later, Apple Silicon or Intel. Windows: Windows 10/11 (64-bit). Mac version launches first; Windows is coming soon.
faq.q4: Does it require an internet connection?
faq.a4: No. All ML inference runs on your device. No photos are sent anywhere.
faq.q5: How many ML models does it use?
faq.a5: 20+ models covering image quality, aesthetics, similarity embeddings, face recognition, VLM assessment, and image classification. All swappable in settings.
faq.a6: No. BurstPick is non-destructive. Export creates hard links to save disk space; your originals stay untouched.
faq.a7: Yes. Export your Keep/Reject decisions and star ratings as XMP sidecar files, or export directly to a Lightroom Classic catalog.
faq.a8: A team of photographers and macOS engineers who shoot 10,000+ frames per session. We built it because we needed it. Existing tools didn't get burst workflows.
faq.q9: How does BurstPick fit into my workflow?
faq.a9: It's a companion, not a replacement. Ingest with Photo Mechanic, cull with BurstPick, edit in Lightroom. Full XMP compatibility, no extra steps.
faq.a10: Not yet. Sign up for updates and we'll let you know when it launches.

cta.heading: Ready to find your best shots?
cta.description: We built BurstPick because we spent more time culling than shooting. Native app for Mac and Windows, no subscription, no cloud. Your photos stay on your device.
cta.notify_description: We'll let you know when BurstPick hits the Mac App Store.
cta.requirements: macOS 14+ · Windows 10/11 · Apple Silicon & Intel · Zero dependencies
cta.privacy: On-device processing. Your photos never leave your machine.
cta.successMessage: You're on the list! We'll notify you when BurstPick launches.
cta.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
cta.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

footer.tagline: Burst photo culling, built by photographers who shoot 10K+ frames a day.
footer.built_with: Native app for Mac and Windows. Built with Swift, SwiftUI, Vision, and CoreML.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: BurstPick is built for a local-first workflow. We designed the app so your photos and scoring data stay on your device.
privacyPage.localProcessingBody: All photo analysis, clustering, and ML scoring run locally on your device. Your photos are never uploaded to BurstPick servers.
privacyPage.dataCollectionBody: BurstPick does not collect personal data, usage analytics, crash analytics, tracking identifiers, or advertising identifiers.
privacyPage.permissionsBody: BurstPick requests file-system access and optional camera/photo library access only when needed for photo culling features.
privacyPage.retentionBody: Because BurstPick does not transmit your photos or personal data, there is no remote data retention by BurstPick.
privacyPage.thirdPartyBody: BurstPick does not use third-party analytics or tracking SDKs in the desktop app.
privacyPage.contactBody: If you have privacy questions, please reach out to our support team.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: By downloading or using BurstPick, you agree to these terms.
termsPage.licenseBody: BurstPick is provided under a per-seat commercial license. Each license is granted to a single individual and may be activated on multiple devices owned by that person. You may not share, transfer, or sublicense your license to another individual or organization without prior written consent.
termsPage.acceptableUseBody: You may use BurstPick on any number of your own devices (Mac or Windows) under a single license. The license is personal and non-transferable — sharing accounts or credentials with others is not permitted. You are responsible for your own media and workflow.
termsPage.noWarrantyBody: BurstPick is provided "as is", without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including fitness for a particular purpose.
termsPage.liabilityBody: To the maximum extent permitted by law, BurstPick contributors are not liable for damages arising from use or inability to use the software.
termsPage.openSourceBody: BurstPick includes open-source dependencies that remain subject to their own licenses.
termsPage.changesBody: These terms may be updated over time. Continued use of BurstPick after updates means you accept the revised terms.
termsPage.generalBody: Any matters not explicitly covered by these terms shall be governed by applicable laws and generally accepted commercial practices.
termsPage.contactBody: For legal or licensing questions, please contact our support team.

pricing.heading: Simple, Honest Pricing
pricing.free_desc: Get started with burst culling. No cost, no catch.
pricing.pro_desc: For photographers who shoot thousands of frames per session.
pricing.pro_f4: Preference learning: adapts to your taste
pricing.pro_cta: Coming Soon on the App Store
pricing.guarantee: No subscription. One-time in-app purchase, yours forever.

notDo.heading: What BurstPick Does NOT Do
notDo.subheading: BurstPick does one thing: helps you find your best shots faster.
notDo.item1_desc: BurstPick helps you decide which photos to keep. It's not a photo editor. Your RAW files stay untouched.
notDo.item2_desc: It works alongside your existing tools. Cull with BurstPick, edit in Lightroom. They fit together.
notDo.item3_desc: Everything runs on your device. No cloud, no servers, no data collection.

discord.title: Join Our Community
discord.description: Talk shop with other photographers, share your workflow, and help shape what BurstPick builds next.

about.heading: Built Native. Runs On-Device.
about.description: BurstPick is a native app for Mac and Windows. The Mac version is Swift and SwiftUI, tuned for Apple Silicon. Windows version coming soon. All processing stays on your machine.
about.native_desc: No web wrapper, no Electron. Native performance on Mac and Windows, with a UI that belongs on each platform.
about.ondevice_desc: All 20+ ML models run locally. Your photos are scored and ranked without leaving your machine.
about.silicon_desc: Uses Metal GPU acceleration and the Neural Engine on Apple Silicon. About 90 seconds for 10,000+ photos on M-series chips.
about.privacy_desc: No account, no internet, no data collection. BurstPick works offline. Your photos stay on your machine.

downloadPage.title: BurstPick is Coming Soon
downloadPage.description: Burst photo culling with on-device AI, built by photographers. Native app for macOS and Windows. All processing happens on your machine.
downloadPage.button: Coming Soon to Mac App Store
downloadPage.notify_prompt: Leave your email and we'll let you know when BurstPick is on the Mac App Store.
downloadPage.req_chip_value: Apple Silicon or Intel (Apple Silicon recommended)
downloadPage.privacy_note: All processing happens on your device. No photos are sent anywhere.
downloadPage.windows_description: BurstPick for Windows is coming. Same culling engine, native on Windows.

auth.verifyEmailDesc: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Please check your inbox.
auth.deviceLoginDesc: Authorize BurstPick on your Mac to access your account.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a reset link.

modelsPage.title: ML Models
modelsPage.intro: BurstPick ships with 22 ML models across 6 categories. Every model runs on-device using Apple CoreML and Neural Engine. No photos leave your Mac. Models are either bundled with the app or downloaded when you first select them.

imageQuality.title: Image Quality Assessment
imageQuality.description: Scores each photo on sharpness, noise, exposure, and perceptual clarity. Used to rank photos within burst clusters.

aestheticScore.title: Aesthetic Scoring
aestheticScore.description: Rates artistic appeal based on composition, color harmony, and visual balance. Trained on large-scale human preference data.

imageEmbedding.title: Image Embedding
imageEmbedding.description: Turns photos into vectors for similarity clustering. Groups burst sequences and flags duplicates or near-duplicates.

faceEmbedding.title: Face Embedding
faceEmbedding.description: Builds face identity vectors for person grouping. Clusters photos by who appears in them.

vlmAssessment.title: Vision Language Model (VLM)
vlmAssessment.description: Reads photo content using natural language. Gives scene descriptions and quality reasoning that go beyond numerical scores.

imageClassification.title: Image Classification
imageClassification.description: Tags photos with scene and object labels for filtering and organization. Uses Apple's Vision framework.

modelsPage.footer: All models run as CoreML on your Mac using CPU, GPU, and Neural Engine. Download sizes are for the compressed CoreML package. Memory figures are approximate GPU/ANE usage during inference.

supportPage.title: Support
supportPage.intro: Need help with BurstPick? We're here to assist. Reach out through any of the channels below.
supportPage.emailBody: For technical issues, license questions, or feature requests, email us directly. We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.
supportPage.discordBody: Join our Discord server to chat with other photographers, share your workflow, get quick tips, and stay updated on new releases.
supportPage.faqBody: Check our FAQ section on the homepage for answers to common questions about supported formats, system requirements, pricing, Lightroom integration, and more.
supportPage.req2: Apple Silicon or Intel processor (Apple Silicon recommended)
supportPage.req3: ~500 MB disk space (with bundled ML models)
supportPage.responseBody: Email support requests are typically answered within 24 hours on business days. Discord community questions often get faster responses from both the team and fellow photographers.
